{{Quote|Lt. Thyte, signal Governor Monjai down on Kal'Shebbol and inform her of our destination.|Captain [[Keleman Ciro]]|<ref name="O">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Omens|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref>}}
'''Monjai''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Following the [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Monjai was appointed to the post of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] since it was felt that she would better relate to the large non-[[Human/Legends|Human]] population on the planet. Monjai's assignment was welcomed by the world's [[Alien/Legends|alien]] community, and she immediately set about rebuilding the damaged infrastructure and crafting some sort of local defense force to ensure the planet's security. Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later, Monjai greeted the returning crew of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' after their lengthy [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ruler of Kal'Shebbol, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].

==Biography==
In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Monjai was serving the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and was installed as the new [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], after the world was successfully [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberated]]. The planet had been under the control of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], who had quietly removed the Kathol [[Sector/Legends|sector]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="TSB">{{DarkStryder|adventure=The Saga Begins|book=The DarkStryder Campaign}}</ref> following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] [[4 ABY/Legends|four years]] previously.<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> A New Republic [[New Republic task force (Kal'Shebbol)|task force]] was dispatched to the planet, along with elements of [[Katarn Commandos|Page's Commandos]], to free the world and capture the Moff. Despite their efforts, Sarne was able to escape from the New Republic along with the majority of his [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] and flee into the Kathol sector.<ref name="TSB" />

Monjai's first order of business was to stop Kal'Shebbol from descending into chaos following the battle to free the planet. During his time on the planet, Moff Sarne had alienated the large non-[[Human/Legends|Human]] population by not respecting their traditional clan and [[City/Legends|city]]-state societal structure, and installed [[Imperial Prefect]]s over local community leaders. As a result, most of the non-Human population was ill-disposed toward Humans in general. It was hoped that Monjai, as an Elomin, would serve to reassure the various [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that called Kal'Shebbol home of the New Republic's good intentions. The decision proved to be a worthwhile one, and the alien communities accepted her appointment, allowing her to spend time building good will among the population.<ref name="TDC" />

The New Republic [[Task force/Legends|task force]] that had been assigned to assault Kal'Shebbol left the planet three [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the liberation, heading to [[Bozhnee sector/Legends|Bozhnee sector]] to join up with another [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] group under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sarin Virgilio]].<ref name="TSB" /> This left the planet virtually undefended, although the New Republic had promised to deploy a defense force to the planet inside three [[Standard month/Legends|months]]. In the meantime, Monjai was forced to scour the planet and attempt to cobble together a military force out of whatever had not been destroyed during the battle for the world.<ref name="TDC" />

Shortly after the New Republic task force left the planet, the New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Kal'Shebbol preparing to set out into the Kathol sector to [[DarkStryder Campaign|track down]] Moff Sarne, intercepted a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] from the nearby planet of [[Kolatill]]. In the wake of the New Republic's liberation of Kal'Shebbol, the people of Kolatill had followed suit and overthrown their Imperial governor. In retaliation, Moff Sarne had ordered an [[Bombing of Domaz|attack]] on the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city of [[Domaz]], which had been conducted by the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]''. While the ''FarStar'' headed to the planet to assist in recovery operations, Monjai promised to send medical relief [[Starship/Legends|ships]] as soon as she could, although it would take two days to prep them.<ref name="O" />

Several months after the ''FarStar'' left Kal'Shebbol, a New Republic force departed from the planet to assist the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] after receiving progress updates through the [[Lifeline Project]].<ref name="E">''[[Endgame]]''</ref> The Lifeline Project was a communications link set up by the ''FarStar''{{'s}} crew to maintain contact with the New Republic as they passed through the volatile and unstable [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]].<ref name="TKR">''[[The Kathol Rift]]''</ref> However, due to the distance between Kal'Shebbol and the ''FarStar''{{'s}} location at the planet [[Kathol (planet)|Kathol]], it would take several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] for the force to get there, and several weeks to return. When the force returned with the victorious survivors of the ''FarStar''{{'s}} crew—the corvette had been lost during the [[Battle of Kathol System|Battle of Kathol]], but Moff Sarne had been defeated—Monjai greeted them enthusiastically.<ref name="E" />

==Personality and traits==
Monjai was a competent administrator and organizer which led to her appointment to Kal'Shebbol, a planet that was forced to rebuild in the wake of Sarne's departure and the New Republic's liberation. Monjai also had a grasp of [[Politics/Legends|politics]], and realized that the way to win over the population of Kal'Shebbol was to appear in public and forge good relations with the various communities.<ref name="TDC" /> She also saw that supplying medical aid to Kolatill would increase the New Republic's standing in the sector, and help victims of Imperial oppression.<ref name="O" /> Although Elomin were noted for their logical disposition,<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> Monjai was not immune to displaying emotion as she enthusiastically greeted the returning crew of the ''FarStar'' after their months-long mission.<ref name="E" />

==Behind the scenes==
Monjai was created as a background character for [[West End Games]]' [[1995]] publication ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', the first installment in the [[The DarkStryder Campaign (series)|multi-book adventure of the same name]] to flesh out the post-Sarne situation on Kal'Shebbol.<ref name="TDC" /> She was subsequently mentioned in the last book of the series, ''[[Endgame]]'', in [[1996]].<ref name="E" />
